// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: HashTable
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{


    [StructLayout(LayoutKind.Auto)]
    private struct E
    {
        internal uint Key;
        internal sbyte Next;
        internal E(uint key, sbyte next)
        {
            Key = key;
            Next = next;
        }
    };

    private static readonly sbyte[] _buckets = new sbyte[] {
        1, 2, 3, 4
    };

    private static readonly E[] _entries = {
        new E(uint.MinValue, -1), new E(1u, -1), new E(2u, -1), new E(uint.MaxValue, -1)
    };

    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    private static ulong Hash(uint value)
    {
        return (ulong)value;
    }

    
    public static bool Contains(uint key)
    {


        ulong hash = Hash(key);
        int index = (int)(hash % 4);
        sbyte i = (sbyte)(_buckets[index] - 1);

        while (i >= 0)
        {
            ref E entry = ref _entries[i];

            if (entry.Key == key)
                return true;

            i = entry.Next;
        }

        return false;
    }

    public const int ItemCount = 4;
    public const uint MinKey = uint.MinValue;
    public const uint MaxKey = uint.MaxValue;
}
